title: Create: Pizza
description: Create addon that adds pizza to create mod
body:
# Create: Pizza 🍕
Create: Pizza is a Create Fabric addon that adds **pizza** along with other pizza-y things (see below). This mod is still being developed and expect to see changes in future updates. 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jSm5U49XU8Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Example of Pizza Automation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F3Uy18CF/images/41fb5b0350732cfe92d78b4bf8c844f8aa179342.png)
![Tomato Factory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F3Uy18CF/images/c52b28c075ec554fd7e21a5c842110d3d307be75.png)

## 🔨 Features 
### Pizza Types
* Cheese Pizza
* Sausage Pizza
* Pepperoni Pizza

### Tomatoes
* Tomatoes
* Throwable Tomatoes
* Tomato Plant
* Tomato Factory

### Misc
* 2 new music discs
* Pizza automation

## 📥 Installation
Use [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) and place the mod into the `mods` folder in your minecraft directory.

-OR-

Get the Modrinth app and download from there.

### Note: You could probably use this mod on forge if you install [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api/version/0.87.0+1.9.2+1.20.1)

**You need to download [Create: Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric/version/0.5.1-j-build.1631+mc1.20.1) and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.92.3+1.20.1)**

## 💖 Special Thanks

Special thanks to Koogee for making Tomato Jam, QuietBat for making the Tomato Jam music disc texture.

## 🚗 Roadmap

* Compatibility with Create: Bitterballen
* Compatibility with Farmer's Delight
* Fix loot tables 
* More pizza types
* Pineapple??

## ❓ Suggestions

DM me on discord (non_reai) (Community too small for a server yet lol)
Email me at nonnin@non-reai.xyz

## 💸 Donate

This is my first minecraft mod. If you would like to fund my mod making journey it would be very much appreciated. 

[![Buy me a coffee button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8321667e41e697ae9502860cd999216dad55867.webp)](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/nonnin)
